name: Document Classifier
description: Classifies a document type and extracts key structured information

config.prompt:
Invoice #INV-2024-0892
Date: 15 June 2024
From: Acme Supplies Ltd
To: TechCorp Inc

Description: Cloud server hosting services — June 2024
Quantity: 1
Unit Price: $4,500.00
Tax (10%): $450.00
Total Due: $4,950.00

Payment due within 30 days. Bank transfer preferred.

config.name: Document Analyst
config.instructions: Given the document and its classification, extract the following into a structured JSON: document_type, key_entities (names, companies), dates, monetary_amounts, action_items (what needs to happen next), and a one-sentence summary. Return only valid JSON.
